title: Femboy Hideaway Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon based modpack for Femboy Hideaway discord. Enjoy building detailed homes with realistic furniture, or catch a team of cobblemon to challenge your friends. Explore new biomes with Oh The Biomes We've Gone, and master Enchanted Witchcraft
body:
modpack for femboy hideaway official cobblemon server.

With our new modpack we hope to give a relaxing and fun experience to anyone willing to join us.

Based around the Cobblemon mod and cozy minecraft atmosphere, this modpack includes mega evolved cobblemon, macaw's and Mr.Crayfish furniture, Oh The Biomes We've Gone, Iron Chests, Travelers backpack, Enchanted: witchcraft , and much more. 



Join our server to connect with friendly and fun people to play with. Join a town, meet our gym leaders, and find how you wish to play with a variety of mods.
Discord link: discord.gg/jMfnufcVJB
